name: Eggplant Tahini Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Prick the eggplant several times with a fork.
3. Bake the eggplant in the preheated oven for 30-40 minutes or until softened and the skin has turned dark brown.
4. Cool, trim ends, and peel the eggplant.
5. Process the flesh in a blender or food processor with garlic, shallots, garam masala, tahini, lemon peel, and juice until smooth and evenly combined.
6. Season with salt.
7. Spoon the mixture into a serving bowl, drizzle with olive oil, and sprinkle with cayenne pepper.
8. Garnish with lemon slices and parsley sprig, if desired, and serve with pita bread.
